---
id: list-keys
title: "List registered JAR signing keys"
description: "Returns the metadata (alias, algorithm, registered_at) for every key currently registered for the authenticated tenant."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List registered JAR signing keys"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/plugins/jar-keys"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the metadata (alias, algorithm, registered_at) for every key currently registered for the authenticated tenant.

</ParamsDetails>
